---
name: Feature request / RFC
about: Propose a new feature or scope a larger piece of work
title: "feat: "
labels: []
assignees: []
---

## Motivation

<!--
Why does this need to exist? What problem does it solve, and for whom?
Explain the problem before the solution.
-->

## Goals

<!--
The outcomes this feature should deliver. Keep these themes, not tasks.
-->

## Scope

### P0 — Must ship

-

### P1 — Strongly aligned

-

### P2 — Stretch

-

## Success Criteria

<!--
Concrete, checkable signals that the feature is done. Avoid vague phrases
like "works well" — prefer measurable statements.
-->

-

## Non-goals

<!--
What this issue explicitly is not trying to do, so scope does not drift.
-->

-

## Dependencies & references

<!--
Linked issues, PRs, upstream bugs, prior art.
-->

-
